nasb.text: The mandrakes have given forth fragrance; And over our doors are all choice fruits, Both new and old, Which I have saved up for you, my beloved.

esv.text: The mandrakes give forth fragrance, and beside our doors are all choice fruits, new as well as old, which I have laid up for you, O my beloved.

cnv.text: 風茄正在散發香氣； 在我們的門旁有各樣佳美的果子， 新的舊的都有。 我的良人哪，這些都是我為你保存的。

ccb.text: 那里风茄飘香， 门口有各样上好的新陈美果。 我的良人，这都是我为你存留的。
